- Ognuno ha il suo stile, io sono così, prendere o lasciare ;) non cambierò per coloro che mi insultano. Mi piace tenerla così questa, è genuina
- Esiste una lunga lista di parole bannate che vi impediscono di commentare facendo stupidaggini, diciamo che aiutano il cervello a riflettere un po' di più la volta successiva, non offendete nessuno, portate rispetto e godetevi la permanenza!
- Registro con OBS o scheda di acquisizione per console
- Purtroppo da tempo non riesco più per questioni di tempo a dedicare del tempo a tutti coloro che necessitano del tempo, nonostante questo dedico comunque del tempo a chi dedica del tempo a lasciare un messaggio, siate originali e la probabilità di ricevere una risposta sarà sicuramente maggiore

St3pNy

snippet.title: IN THE GREY | Official Trailer | Only in Theaters May 15
snippet.description:
When billions get stolen, they are the pros who steal it back. Watch Jake Gyllenhaal, Henry Cavill, and Eiza González in the official trailer for #InTheGrey. Written & Directed by Guy Ritchie. Only in theaters May 15.

In The Grey follows a covert team of elite operatives who live in the global shadows, as comfortable wielding power and influence as they are automatic weapons and high explosives.  When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, the team is sent to steal it back on what would be for anyone else a suicide mission. What begins as an impossible heist gets much worse, spiraling into an all-out war of strategy, deception and survival.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Lewis Capaldi - Someone You Loved (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎵 Lewis Capaldi - Someone You Loved (Lyrics)

⏬ Stream “Someone You Loved” by "Lewis Capaldi" here: https://lewiscapaldi.lnk.to/lc_syl

🎤 Song Lyrics: Lewis Capaldi - Someone You Loved

[Verse 1]
I'm going under and this time I fear there's no one to save me
This all or nothing really got a way of driving me crazy
I need somebody to heal
Somebody to know
Somebody to have
Somebody to hold
It's easy to say
But it's never the same
I guess I kinda liked the way you numbed all the pain

[Chorus]
Now the day bleeds
Into nightfall
And you're not here
To get me through it all
I let my guard down
And then you pulled the rug
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved

This all or nothing way of loving got me sleeping without you

Somebody to heal

I guess I kinda liked the way you helped me escape

To get me through it all
I let my guard down

I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved

snippet.title: Ricky Martin - Vente Pa' Ca ft. Maluma ✨ (Letra/Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Vente Pa' Ca is a vibrant Latin pop anthem about attraction, chemistry, and living in the moment. 🔥🎶 Ricky Martin and Maluma blend smooth vocals with catchy rhythms, creating a playful, feel-good vibe perfect for dancing and summer nights. 💃✨

🔔 Turn on notifications to find out about upcoming videos!

⏬ Digital Platforms:
🚀"Ricky Martin - Vente Pa' Ca ft. Maluma": https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/1MiYS9BbxaQcbByXND1YsX

📸Follow Ricky Martin:
▶ YouTube: @rickymartin 
▶ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ricky_martin/?hl=es-la
▶ Twitter: https://x.com/ricky_martin?lang=es
▶ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RickyMartinOfficialPage/?locale=es_LA
▶ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@ricky__martin?lang=es

📸Follow Maluma:
▶ YouTube:  @Maluma_Official 
▶ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maluma/?hl=es-la
▶ Twitter: https://x.com/maluma?lang=es
▶ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maluma/
▶ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@maluma?lang=es

📸Follow Octava:
▶Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fededlyrics/
🎵 Follow the official Octava playlist on Spotify: https://spti.fi/octava

──────────────────────────────

🎤Lyrics: Ricky Martin - Vente Pa' Ca ft. Maluma  (Letra/Lyrics)

[Verso 1: Ricky Martin]
Ven, te cuento de una vez
Tu descanso está en la cama de mis pies
Ven, te cuento un, dos, tres
Mis pasitos son descalzos, sin estrés

[Pre-Estribillo: Ricky Martin]
Dime si hay otro lugar
Para dejar mi corazón (Mi corazón)
Ay, tienes razón
Mejor, ¿por qué no nos vamos los dos?

[Estribillo: Ricky Martin]
Si tú quieres nos bañamos
Si tú quieres nos soplamos
Pa' secarnos lo moja'o
Si tu boca quiere beso
Y tu cuerpo quiere de eso, arreglamos
Si tú quieres un atajo y lo quieres por abajo
Yo te llevo bien calla'o
Vente pa'cá, vente pa'cá, vente pa'cá, ah-auh

[Verso 2: Ricky Martin]
Enamorados, qué calor
Nos comimos boca a boca en el sillón
Fue por hambre, fue por sed (Fue por sed)
Me bebiste a fondo blanco con tu piel

[Pre-Estribillo: Ricky Martin]
Dime si hay otro lugar
Para dejar mi corazón (Mi corazón)
Ay, tienes razón
Mejor, ¿por qué no nos vamos los dos?

[Estribillo: Ricky Martin]
Si tú quieres nos bañamos
Si tú quieres nos soplamos
Pa' secarnos lo moja'o
Si tu boca quiere beso
Y tu cuerpo quiere de eso, arreglamos
Si tú quieres un atajo y lo quieres por abajo
Yo te llevo bien calla'o
Vente pa'cá, vente pa'cá, vente pa'cá, ah-auh

[Verso 3: Maluma]
(All right, too right, baby)
(Pretty Boy, Dirty Boy, baby)
Como me baila y me seduce
Y cuando le apagan la' luce'
Ella se luce y yo se lo hago otra vez (Otra vez)
Eh-yeh
Llevo tanto tiempo mirando reaccionar (Jajaja)
Dime qué estás esperando baby, no hay demora
Pégate a mí, bien rico a mí
No dejes que pasen las horas (Uh-uh-uh)
Tu booty me arrebata, tu sonrisa me atrapa
Quiero tenerte siempre y no dejarte sola
Esta historia no se acaba, ven, vamo' pa' mi cama
Esta noche tú te enamora'
Dime de una vez si es que al lado tuyo yo estaré
Todo lo que pida' te daré (Jajaja)
Esta noche tú te enamora'

[Estribillo: Ricky Martin]
Si tú quieres nos bañamos
Si tú quieres nos soplamos
Pa' secarnos lo moja'o
Si tu boca quiere beso
Y tu cuerpo quiere de eso, arreglamos
Si tú quieres un atajo y lo quieres por abajo
Yo te llevo bien calla'o
Vente pa'cá, vente pa'cá, vente pa'cá, ah-auh

[Outro]
Vente pa'cá, vente pa'cá, vente pa'cá, ah-auh
